title: Strongly Lie nilpotent group algebras of index at most 8
journal: Journal of Algebra and Its Applications
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Ltd
abstract: Let K be a field of characteristic p > 0 and let G be an arbitrary group. In this paper, we classify group algebras KG which are strongly Lie nilpotent of index at most 8. We also show that for k ≤ 6, KG is strongly Lie nilpotent of index k if and only if it is Lie nilpotent of index k.
